### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — GAMEPAD.c batch 3 (PollVsync/GetNumConnected/ProcessHold) — Match (no bugs)
- **GAMEPAD_PollVsync @0x80025410** — **Ghidra MISLABELS this "GetNumConnected"; syms926 = PollVsync (authoritative), project names it correctly.** void; enumerates slots×ports (init numPorts=2/maxPadsPerPort=1; multitap[slotBuffer[0].plugged==0 && controllerData==0x80]→1/4). Ghidra raw ptr math `gamepad[0].motorCurr(@0x2a) + iByteOfs(0x2d0+0x22*port) - 0x2a` = &slotBuffer[port] (sizeof MultitapPacket=0x22); sub-packet descend `+iMotorOfs(2+slot*8)` = controllers[slot]. **Unplugged compound cond decoded**: multitap→unplugged iff outer_plugged!=0 || sub_plugged!=0; non-mtap→outer_plugged!=0 — EXACT match to proj `unpluggedPort=((cData==0x80 && controllers[i].plugged!=0)||(plugged!=0))` (OR commutative). Else: socket=(port<<4)|i, PadGetState, ProcessState(pad,state,socket). Trailing gamepadType=0 fill to gamepad[8]. ✓
- **GAMEPAD_GetNumConnected @0x800255b4** — u_int; same slot/port enumeration. **Short-circuit-with-side-effect cond `(cData!=0x80 || (pSub=&plugged, descend, *pSub==0)) && (ptr->plugged==0)`** = De Morgan of proj nested `if(plugged==0){if(cData==0x80)ptr=&controllers[Port]; if(ptr->plugged==0){connected}}` — identical (non-mtap: connected iff outer==0; mtap: outer==0 && sub==0). Sets bit `1<<(slot*4+port)`, numGamepadsConnected=idx+1, ptrControllerPacket, gamepadID=slot*0x10+port; NULL-fill rest. Flag/disconnect: **proj writes gamepadsConnectedByFlag UNCONDITIONALLY vs ghidra conditional — identical** (skipped case writes equal value); returns 0 if old==-1 or old==new, else ((new^old)&old)!=0 (=a pad disconnected). ✓
- **GAMEPAD_ProcessHold @0x80025718** — u_int, loops 8 pads: buttonsHeldPrevFrame=Curr; NULL→clear both; else plugged==0: rawButtons=(in1<<8|in2)^0xffff (endian flip, active-high); NEGCON((PAD_ID_NEGCON<<4)|3): btn_1/btn_2/trg_l >0x40 → |0x40/0x80/4; ANALOG_STICK((<<4)|3): rawButtons<<=0x10; remap loop over gamepadMapBtn/g_aButtonRemapTable (stride 8 {input,output}, 0-term): if(raw&input)held|=output; buttonsHeldCurrFrame=held; heldAny|=held (order vs framesSinceLastInput block irrelevant); held==0→framesSinceLastInput++ cap 65000 else =0. Returns heldAny. **NOTE(claude) u32-raw-word CONFIRMED**: uVar4 must be u32 — the <<0x10 + high-half remap dies if truncated to u16 (kills flightstick). ✓
**GAMEPAD.c: 12/15 exported verified.** DEFERRED: ProcessSticks @0x80025854 (+5 static helpers), ProcessTapRelease @0x80025d10, ProcessMotors @0x80025e18.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — GAMEPAD.c batch 4 (ProcessTapRelease/ProcessMotors) — Match (no bugs)
- **GAMEPAD_ProcessTapRelease @0x80025d10** — u_int; stickAsDpad flag: **ASM `lbu t0,0xd2(gp)` = gp(0x8008cf6c)+0xd2 = 0x8008d03e = proj sdata->unkPadSetActAlign[6] — PROJECT CORRECT; the Ghidra PLATE typo'd it "g_boolStickAsDpad@0x8009d03e" (should be 0x8008d03e, trust the instruction).** For i<numGamepadsConnected@0x314: NULL packet→Tapped=Released=0; else if flag: stickLX<0x20→|BTN_LEFT / >0xe0→|BTN_RIGHT, stickLY<0x20→|BTN_UP / >0xe0→|BTN_DOWN (Y-neutral 0x20..0xe0 skips write via goto — proj if/else-if identical); heldAny|=Curr; Tapped=~Prev&Curr (rising), Released=Prev&~Curr (falling). Loop re-reads numGamepadsConnected vs proj caches numConnected — equiv (unmodified in loop). ✓
- **GAMEPAD_ProcessMotors @0x80025e18** (ghidra ProcessForceFeedback) — **field map: motorCurr@0x2a=motorDesired, motorStepRate@0x2c=motorPower, motorPrev@0x2e=motorSubmit; data14@0x30 shock: FrameFreq@0x30/FrameForce1@0x34/FrameForce2@0x38/ValFreq@0x3c/ValForce1@0x40/ValForce2@0x41; unk42@0x42/unk43@0x43/unk44@0x44/unk45@0x45/unk46@0x46/unk48@0x48.** Active gate `(gameMode1&0xf/PAUSE_1..4)==0 && !boolDemoMode && packet && !RaceFlag_IsTransitioning()`. **JOGCON(0xe3)**: unk44!=0→motorDesired[0]=0x40; else unk46==0→steer-feel [bVar1=unk43; if(unk43<unk42 || (bVar1=unk43>>4, unk48!=0)){bVar1=unk42>>4; if((timer&unk42&0xf)!=0 && (bVar1=(unk42-0x10)>>4,(unk42-0x10)<0))bVar1=0} bVar1|=0x30] (**NOTE(claude) raw-unk42-pulse CONFIRMED — timer&unk42&0xf uses RAW byte not >>4**); else(unk46!=0)→motorDesired[0]=unk45, unk46-=elapsedTimeMS, <1→unk46=unk45=0; then **ND-bug** `if(unk48!=0)unk48=0` ≡ proj unconditional unk48=0; motorDesired[1]=0. **DUALSHOCK**: motorDesired[0]= (FrameFreq!=0 && (timer&ValFreq)==0)?0xff:0; motorDesired[1]= FrameForce1!=0?ValForce1 : (ValForce1=0, FrameForce2!=0?ValForce2:(ValForce2=0,0)); dec 3 FrameFreq/Force1/Force2 counters. **DECAY**(else): motorDesired[0]=(packet&&JOGCON&&unk44)?0x40:0, motorDesired[1]=0, clear FrameFreq/Force1/Force2(data14[0..0xb]) + unk45/unk46. Common: unk44!=0→unk44--. **Power-sum**: proj INLINE in main loop vs ghidra SEPARATE post-loop — equiv (no cross-pad dep, loop-fusion): +motorPower[k] if motorDesired[k]!=0. **Power-cap** totalPower>60: startOfs=timer%numPads (ghidra trap div-guard harmless), 2 passes (motor[1] then motor[0]) round-robin i=startOfs..startOfs+numPads-1, idx=i%numPads (ghidra `uRobinIdx>=numPads?(-numPads)*0x50`), disable motorDesired[k]=0 & totalPower-=motorPower[k] until <=60. **Final**: motorSubmit[0/1]=motorDesired[0/1]. ✓ ALL MATCH. **unk46 timer-underflow non-issue**: ghidra checks 32-bit `temp<1` pre-truncate, proj s16 `unk46<1` post-truncate — identical for positive-timer domain (no s16 overflow). CTR_INTERNAL debug-pad globals native-only.
**GAMEPAD.c: 14/15 exported verified.** DEFERRED: only ProcessSticks @0x80025854 (+5 static helpers IsAnalogLike/StepTowardZero/Max/Center/ResolveAxis/ResetRaw/CheckIdleAxis).

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — GAMEPAD.c ProcessSticks @0x80025854 — **Fix 143 (real bug: JogCon twist reads wrong rwd field)** — FILE COMPLETE
- **GAMEPAD_ProcessSticks** (analog-stick/racing-wheel resolver; proj refactored into 7 static helpers IsAnalogLike/StepTowardZero/Max/Center/ResolveAxis/ResetRaw[AndResolved]/CheckIdleAxis — all folded into the one binary fn). 8-pad loop. controllerData dispatch: **0x53(ANALOG_STICK)/0x73(DUALSHOCK)→analog copy** (leftX/leftY/rightX/rightY, +1-frame leftY DEGLITCH: if raw leftY==0xff && prevRawLeftY(unk_1)!=0xff use prev); **0x23(NEGCON)→** rwd(if i<4), stickLX_dontUse1=twist(rightX), LY/RX/RY=0x80; **0xe3(JOGCON)→** rwd, twist calc, LY/RX/RY=0x80; **else→ResetRaw**(all 0x80). CheckIdleAxis ×4: |axis-0x80|>0x30→framesSinceLastInput=0. IsAnalogLike (0x53/0x73/0x23/0xe3). ResolveAxis(LX:LEFT/RIGHT, LY:UP/DOWN): held&neg→StepTowardZero, held&pos→StepTowardMax, useRaw(=isAnalog)→raw dontUse1, else→StepTowardCenter. All 3 Step ramps (±0xff/frame, clamp to 0/0xff/0x80) verified vs ghidra inline. ✓ (all Match EXCEPT the twist field)
- **🐛 Fix 143 — JogCon twist reads rwd->deadZone(0x2) but retail reads rwd->range(0x4)**: ASM **0x800258e8 (neg branch) + 0x80025924 (pos branch) BOTH `lh v1,0x4(a3)`** where a3=rwd (confirmed `sw a3,0x4c(a0)`=pad->rwd; jog_rot=`lh 0x4(packet@0x20)`). RacingWheelData{gamepadCenter@0,deadZone@2,range@4}. Project lines 538/553 read `rwd->deadZone`(0x2) → **wrong offset**. deadZone(0x30 default) vs range(0x7f default) are DISTINCT (set from raceConfig_DeadZone/_Range in MainFreeze.c:282/340; also VehPhysJoystick default {deadZone=0x30,range=0x7f}) ⇒ OBSERVABLE mis-scale of JogCon/MadCatz-wheel twist FF (unk43=data14[0x13]). **Fixed both branches → rwd->range** + NOTE(claude). Built clean. Twist formula: `iVar7=((|jog_rot|-10)-range)*8` clamp[0,0xff]; sSteer=jog_rot+0x80 (clamp jog<-0x80→0, jog>0x7f→0xff).
**GAMEPAD.c FULLY VERIFIED (15/15 exported + 7 statics)** — batches 1-4 + ProcessSticks; 1 real bug (Fix 143), plus confirmed prior NOTE(claude): JogCon1 sh-vs-2sb, ProcessAnyoneVars int-return, ProcessHold u32-raw-word, ProcessMotors raw-unk42-pulse, ProcessTapRelease plate-typo (0x8008d03e). Tally: **Fix 143**.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — DecalFont.c DrawMultiLineStrlen @0x80022930 + DrawMultiLine @0x80022b34 — Match (no bugs) — FILE COMPLETE
- **DecalFont_DrawMultiLineStrlen** — word-wrap engine (926=UsaRetail path: #if BUILD>UsaRetail flags&0x800 draw-guard INACTIVE→unconditional DrawLineStrlen; #if BUILD>SepReview→font_charPixHeight). Per line: strPointer=str; if(*str!='\r') inner word-scan while(1): currPointer=strPointer/lettersRemaining=len; if(c==' ' && len!=0)→advance 1; c=*currPointer; break if c==0||remaining==0; if(c!=' ' && c!='\r') scan word to \0/space/\r; lineLen=(s16)GetLineWidthStrlen(str, currPointer-str, ft); break if maxPixLen<=lineLen OR (c=*currPointer, strPointer=currPointer, len=lettersRemaining, c=='\r'). DrawLineStrlen(str, (s16)(strPointer-str), posX, (s16)(posY+totalHeight), ft, flags) — **posY: proj `posY+H`(sign-ext) ≡ ghidra `(ushort)posY+H`(zero-ext) after (s16) trunc at param (low16 agree mod 0x10000)**. totalHeight+=font_charPixHeight[ft]. Terminate: *strPointer==0→return; len!=0→strPointer++/len--; (*strPointer==0 || (str=strPointer, len==0))→return. Handles explicit '\r' (skip inner loop → blank line + advance). ✓ MATCH. **Non-observable nuance**: ghidra returns `(s16)totalHeight`, proj returns full `int totalPassageHeight` — identical for real block heights (always ≪0x7fff, few lines × ~8-17px/256px screen); DrawMultiLine truncates (s16) anyway. Document-not-fix.
- **DecalFont_DrawMultiLine @0x80022b34** — `(s16)DrawMultiLineStrlen(str,-1,(s16)posX,(s16)posY,(s16)maxPixLen,ft,(s16)flags)`. ✓

- **INSTANCE_BirthWithThread_Stack @0x80030a50** — forwards argStack[0..6] to BirthWithThread. **Ghidra decomp `void`; ASM RETURNS v0-passthrough** (0x80030a90 `jal 0x800309a4`, then `jr ra` NO v0 touch) — proj `return INSTANCE_BirthWithThread(...)` CORRECT (void-return-misinfer class, cf ProcessAnyoneVars). Args: a0-a3=argStack[0..3], sp+0x10/0x14/0x18=argStack[4..6]. ✓
**INSTANCE.c: 7/9 verified.** DEFERRED: LevInitAll @0x80030ad4 (level-instance loader), LevDelayedLInBs @0x80030ed4.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — INSTANCE.c batch 3 (LevInitAll/LevDelayedLInBs) — Match (no bugs) — FILE COMPLETE
- **INSTANCE_LevInitAll @0x80030ad4** (instantiate all LEV static objects) — per InstDef: inst=LIST_RemoveFront(JitPools.instance.free), levInstDef->ptrInstance(@0x2c)=inst, ret if NULL; inline-copy 0x2c bytes InstDef→inst+8 (2×16B loop to +0x20 + 3-word tail); depthBiasNormal=unk24-2, depthBiasSecondary=unk24+12, reflectionRGBA=0x7f7f7f, animIndex/animFrame=0, instDef=levInstDef, vertSplit=0, unk53=1, bitCompressed=0; ConvertRotToMatrix(&matrix, rot); matrix.t=pos(x@0x30/y@0x32/z@0x34, s16→int); thread=NULL; idpp[j<numPlyr]: mh=0, pushBuffer=&pushBuffer[j].
  - **LInB block EQUIVALENCE PROVEN**: proj `if((s16)modelID>0){if(!NO_LEV_INSTANCE){meta=COLL_LevModelMeta(modelID); if(meta->LInB)meta->LInB(inst)}}` vs ghidra `if(!NO_LEV_INSTANCE && (meta=COLL_LevModelMeta((s16)id))!=NULL && meta->pLInB)...`. **COLL_LevModelMeta@0x8001d094 NEVER returns NULL** (modelID<0xe2→g_aMetaDataModels@0x80081088 + id*0xc, else entry0) ⇒ ghidra meta!=NULL is dead ⇒ proj omit safe. **g_aMetaDataModels[0].pLInB @0x8008108c = 0x00000000 NULL** (read_memory verified) ⇒ modelID<=0 (proj gate skips) and modelID>=0xe2 (both→entry0 NULL) BOTH skip in retail too; 0<id<0xe2 both check entry[id].pLInB. Faithful micro-refactor (short-circuits always-skip cases).
  - **NOTE(claude) two-sequential-filters CONFIRMED**: **Filter A** (TT/RELIC/time-crate) — `if(TT&&(arcade||relic))hide; else if(RELIC){relic→timeCratesInLEV++; arcade→hide} else{relic→hide}` (ghidra big-if `!TT||(!arcade&&!relic)` = !A1; RELIC!=0→A2, RELIC==0→A3; boolArcadeOnly=(id-PU_FRUIT_CRATE<2)||id==WUMPA, boolRelicOnly=(id-TIME_CRATE_02<2)||id==TIME_CRATE_01). **Falls through (j 0x80030dac) into Filter B** (CRYSTAL_CHALLENGE) — `if(CC){crystal→numCrystalsInLEV++; fruit_crate→hide} else{crystal||TNT||explosive→hide}` (ghidra shared LAB_e18/e20 + cmpVal reuse = clean if/else). Then **Filter C** — `if((!ADVENTURE||!TOKEN_RACE) && id-STATIC_C(0x93)<3)hide`. All independent (not else-if): TT also hides explosives, relic-time-crate only counts. ✓
- **INSTANCE_LevDelayedLInBs @0x80030ed4** — deferred LInB pass: for i<numInst, meta=COLL_LevModelMeta((s16)instDef->model->id); if meta && meta->LInB → meta->LInB(instDef->ptrInstance); instDef+=0x40. ✓

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — HOWL_Channel.c ParseSongToChannels @0x8002bbac (giant CSEQ sequencer) — Match (no bugs)
- **Channel_ParseSongToChannels** — per-frame music tick. Guard boolAudioEnabled(g_bHowlInitialized)!=0 && ptrCseqHeader!=0. **Song struct stride 0x7c, CseqSequences@0x1c** (ghidra folded cursor `g_aSongPool[0].CseqSequences + songOffset + neg`: song=cur-0x1c, tempo@0xc/-0x10, unk10@0x10/-0xc, timeSpentPlaying@0x14/-8, vol_Curr@0x18/-4, vol_New@0x19/-3, vol_StepRate@0x1a/-2, numSequences@0x1b/-1). 2 songs. Skip if !(flags&1) or (flags&2). **Timing**: unk10+=tempo (full 32b), ticks=unk10>>0x10, timeSpentPlaying+=ticks, unk10=(u16)unk10 (ghidra double-writes unk10 full-then-trunc = proj clean form). **Vol-fade** (song+seq): step ±vol_StepRate toward vol_New, boolFinalStep clamp; song-level finalstep && flags&4 → flags&=~4, SongPool_StopAllCseq(song), Music_End(). **Ghidra reuses `changed` reg as boolFinalStep AND boolVolumeChange** (set true at end of each fade block, accumulates) = proj boolFinalStep local + boolVolumeChange. **Note loop** (seq->flags&1): NoteTimeElapsed+=ticks; while(NoteLength<=NoteTimeElapsed){ break if !(flags&1); NoteTimeElapsed-=NoteLength; op=(u8)currNote[0]; if(op<0xb){ opcodeFunc[op](seq) (=g_apCseqOpcodeHandlers); break if !(flags&1); flags&8→(flags&=~8, currNote=firstNote) else currNote+=opcodeOffset[op](=g_anCseqOpcodeLengths); currNote=howl_GetNextNote(currNote,&NoteLength) } }. **Ghidra top-of-loop `if(!(flags&1))break` vs proj immediate post-handler break = equiv (no further note either way, NoteTimeElapsed not re-decremented)**. seq loop seqIdx<numSequences (proj for-bound naturally handles 0). Final: boolVolumeChange→UpdateChannelVol_Music_All(). ✓ ALL MATCH.
**HOWL_Channel.c: 11/12 verified.** DEFERRED: Channel_UpdateChannels @0x8002be9c (last giant, per-frame SPU sync).

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — HOWL_Channel.c Channel_UpdateChannels @0x8002be9c (SPU voice commit) — Match (no bugs) — FILE COMPLETE
- **Channel_UpdateChannels** — per-frame SPU voice commit over 24 (NUM_SFX_CHANNELS=0x18) channels via ChannelUpdateFlags[]. **Pass1 key-off**: if(flags&1){offMask|=1<<ch; if(flags&2)flag&=~1 else flag=0} (ghidra redundant `flags!=0 &&`); SpuSetKey(0,offMask). **Pass2 commit** (per ch): bit1→onMask|=1<<ch; bit4→spuStartAddr (if new!=cur→cur=new, SpuSetVoiceStartAddr); bit8→ADSR (*(int)&ad combined-compare; if diff: cur.ad/sr=new; **ARmode=(s16)ad<0?5:1; SRmode: (s16)sr<0?((sr>>0xe&1)?7:5):((sr>>0xe&1)?3:1); RRmode=(sr>>5&1)?7:3; SpuSetVoiceADSRAttr(ch, ad>>8&0x7f, ad>>4&0xf, sr>>6&0x7f, sr&0x1f, ad&0xf, AR,SR,RR)**); bit0x10→pitch; bit0x20→reverb (SpuSetReverbVoice(reverb!=0, 1<<ch)); bit0x40→volume (*(int)&audioL compare; SpuSetVoiceVolume(ch, new.audioL, new.audioR) — ghidra reads volL from cur.audioL after write = new.audioL); flag=0. SpuSetKey(1,onMask). **Proj OMITS ghidra's outer `if(flags!=0)` Pass2 guard — behaviorally identical (all sub-ifs false + flag=0 no-op when flags==0).** ✓

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — HOWL_Voiceline.c RequestPlay @0x8002cbe8 (giant selection dispatcher) — Match (no bugs) — FILE COMPLETE
- **Voiceline_RequestPlay** — guards: voiceID>=0x18/characterID>=0x10/characterID2>=0x11/gameMode1&END_OF_RACE(0x200000)→ret. voiceType=voiceID[voiceID]. **Taunt skip** (voiceID>=8): alreadyPlayed=timeSet1[cID]&(1<<(voiceID&0x1f)); rng=NextAudioRNG(); rng &= alreadyPlayed?7:3; if(rng!=0)ret. elapsedFrames=SubLo(frameTimer, timeSet2[cID]). **canImmediate(=ghidra bAllowVoice)** = (elapsedFrames>=0x3d) && voiceType<2. **canQueue(=ghidra bPlayAsOtherFX, inverted name!)** = boolCanPlayVoicelines!=0 && !(cooldown!=0 && backup[0xa]==cID) && elapsedFrames>=0x3c. **5-way dispatch (all traced = ghidra bAllowVoice/bPlayAsOtherFX+goto maze)**: canQueue&&!canImmediate→queue; canQueue&&canImmediate&&RNG-odd→OtherFX; canQueue&&canImmediate&&RNG-even→queue; !canQueue&&!canImmediate→ret; !canQueue&&canImmediate→OtherFX. **Queue**: timeSet1[cID]|=1<<(voiceID&0x1f); dedup walk Voiceline2 (voiceID@8 && cID@0xa → ret); slot = Voiceline1.first (RemoveMember free) else recycle Voiceline2.last (RemoveMember active); AddFront(Voiceline2); fill cID@0xa/cID2@0xb/voiceID@8/startFrame@0xc=gGT->timer. **OtherFX**: voiceType0→Play(cID+0x1c,2), voiceType1→Play(cID+0x2c,2), >=2→skip; timeSet2[cID]=frameTimer. **Both-lists-empty edge (ghidra skips AddFront via LAB_8002cee4 goto, proj AddFront(NULL)) = UNREACHABLE (8 pool slots always in free|active)**. NextAudioRNG static = inlined `((rng>>3)+rng*0x20000000)*5+1`. ✓ ALL MATCH.

  - **InsertClosest** (insertion-sort top2): dist<closestDistances[0]→shift slot0→slot1, slot0=new; else dist<closestDistances[1]→slot1=new. (ghidra captures old slot0 before overwrite = proj shift-then-set.)
  - **CalculateLR**: angle=ratan2(vx,-vz)+0x800; lr=(-(angle<<20))>>23 [= ghidra `angle*-0x100000>>0x17`]; clamp: lr<0x81?(lr<-0x80→-0x100-lr):(0x100-lr); return lr+0x80.
  - **Main**: init closest={NULL, 0x7fffffff}; AI loop × player-cam loop InsertClosest. Then i<2: cameraDriver=cameraDC[closestPlayers[i]].driverToFollow; GTE_AudioLR_Driver(&pushBuffer[cp].matrix_Camera, ai, dir); lr=VolumeAdjust(CalculateLR(dir), audioDefaults[4+i]=pan, 10); EngineSound_AI(ai, cameraDriver, i, closestDistances[i], closestDistances[i]-audioDefaults[2+i]=prevDist, lr); prevDist=dist. **audioDefaults layout: [0-1]=vol(g_anAIEngineVol), [2-3]=prevDist, [4-5]=pan — 3× int[2] consecutive.** ✓ ALL MATCH (ghidra phantom oversized stack arrays = decompiler ghosts, behavior unaffected).

Fields: engineSoundVolumeState=nEngineSndVolAccum@0x3B6, engineSoundPitchState=nEngineSndPitchAccum@0x3B8, const_AccelSpeed_ClassStat=const_SpeedometerScale_ClassStat@0x42E, speedometerNeedleValue=nSpeedometerNeedle@0x36E, turnWobbleAngle=nSteerKickAngle@0x3D4.

Vol-slew (|target-pitchState|<0x601 → -500 drift-floor2000/zero, else +2000 cap14000); pitchState=(s16)((target*0x89+state*0x177)>>9); steer=|wheelRotation|. **vol** = MapToRange(volState,0,const,0x82, ACTION_BOT?0xbe:0xe6) + (!DRIFTING && !(flags&8) → steer>>3). **pitch** = MapToRange(pitchState,0,const+const_SacredFireSpeed+0xf00, 0x3c, ACTION_BOT?0xbe:200). **distort**: human→ if DRIFTING{turboRoomLeft==0? (sfxDistortOffset!=0→--) : sfxDistortOffset=((u8)const_turboMaxRoom>>1)-(turboRoomLeft>>6); enginePitch-=|turnWobbleAngle>>3| clamp≥0}; distortVal=enginePitch+sfxDistortOffset. AI→ enginePitch-|wobble>>3| clamp≥0. clamp≤0xff.
  - **common tail** (proj factored out vs ghidra per-branch dup — equiv, depends only on wheelRotation/flags): lr=clamp(0x80-((s16)wheelRotation>>3), 0x40,0xc0); pack vol<<0x10 | distort<<8 | lr; echo|0x1000000 if flags&0x10000; EngineAudio_Recalculate((engine*4+id)&0xffff, packed). ✓ ALL MATCH.

Max-scan ptrQuipStrCurr..Next (=pLinesStart..End): selected = higher priority(nWeight), or equal + `(MixRNG_Scramble()>>3)&0xff < 0x40` (50% tiebreak). oldQuip(EndOfRaceComment_ptrQuip=_lngIndex-as-ptr): if(oldQuip){ if(selected->priority(nWeight@+4) <= old){ !=→ret; ==→RNG>0x3f→ret }; if(old->priority<0)un-negate }. Claim: if(selected->priority>0)negate. Store ptrQuip=selected, characterID=quipContext. timerEndOfRaceVS = BATTLE_MODE?0x96(150):300. QuipStr.priority=VsQuipLine.nWeight@+4. ✓

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — UI_VsQuip.c UI_VsQuipAssignAll @0x80054bfc (giant rule evaluator) — Match (no bugs)
- **UI_VsQuipAssignAll** — data-driven end-of-race quip assigner (9 condition types). numPlyr<2→ret. Rule table = quipData+VS(0x170..0x518)/BAT(0x730..0x850 if BATTLE_MODE) via QuipMetaRaw (=ghidra g_aVsQuipRulesRace/Adv, PSX-ptr relocated). **Field map: pRuleFields[-1]=conditionType, *=flags, [1]=threshold, [3]=driverOffset, [5]=dataSize; accumulator=bestValue, bestDriver(inner)=selectedDriver, candidate=nextSelectedDriver, rivalAttackerIndex=characterID.**
  - **Aging**: every quip line priority(nWeight)+1.
  - **Leader detect** (threadBuckets[PLAYER=0]): clear EndOfRaceComment; score=POINT_LIMIT?battleSetup.pointsPerTeam[teamID]:BattleHUD.numLives; scoreByDriverID[driverID](perDriverScore)=score; ghidra comma-op cascade (livesOrPoints<=bestScore && (cmpFlag=eq, revert, cmpFlag)) = proj `score>bestScore→{secondScore=bestScore,bestDriver=driver,bestScore=score}` / `==→{secondScore=bestScore,bestDriver=NULL}`. bestScore=scratchInt, secondScore=leaderTieFlag.
  - **Rule loop**: bestValue=(condType==5?0x7fffffff:0); threshold*=|numLaps(s8)| if flags&1. Per driver switch:
    - **0**: v=Read; nextSel=driver/nextThr=v; if(v<=thr){revert; v==thr→NULL} (max>thr).
    - **1**: v=Read; if(v>=0){nextSel=driver/nextThr=v; if(thr<=v){revert; ==→NULL}} (min>=0).
    - **3**: for i<8 v=numTimesAttackedByPlayer[i]; delta=v-bestValue; thr<delta→{characterID=i,sel=driver,bestValue=v}; else -thr<delta→{sel=NULL; bestValue<v→bestValue=v}.
    - **4**: v=Read; delta=v-bestValue; thr<delta→{driver,v}; else{revert; -thr<delta→NULL, bestValue<v→v}.
    - **5**: v=Read; if(v>=0){delta=bestValue-v; thr<delta→{driver,v}; else{revert; -thr<delta→NULL, v<bestValue→v}}.
    - **6**: v=Read; v==(u8)numTimesAttacking→driver.
    - **7**: thr==0 && driver==bestDriver→bestDriver; thr==1 && secondScore!=0 && scoreByDriverID[driverID]==secondScore→driver.
    - **8**: v=Read; v==thr→driver.
    - **9**: EndOfRaceComment_ptrQuip==NULL→UI_VsQuipAssign(driver,&meta,bestDriver,0).
  - Mid-loop: nextSel!=NULL && flags&0xc → Assign(nextSel,&meta,bestDriver,characterID). Loop-end: selectedDriver/threshold/bestValue=next*. Post-loop: Assign(selectedDriver,&meta,bestDriver,characterID). ✓ ALL MATCH (LAB_80054f44/fd0 goto-cascades = proj if/else; ghidra accumulator overwrite+restore in cases 0/6/8 = proj local `value`).
**UI_VsQuip.c: 3/8 verified.** DEFERRED: UI_VsQuipDrawAll @0x800550f4, UI_VsWaitForPressX @0x800552a4.

- Chevrons (warpballDist<16000=0x3e80), 2 sides × 2 POLY_G3(7 words each, |0x6000000): orient=i==0?-1:1. T1 colors r0=rgb0/r1=0x30ffffff/r2=rgb2 (WB 0x309c6900/0x30ffff00, MI 0x3000699c/0x3000ffff); coords x0=x2=sX+orient*sOuterX, x1=sX+orient*reticle, y0=sY-(sVar5+12), y1=y2=sY-12. T2 colors r0/r1/r2 (WB 0x30322b01/0x305b5b00/0x30ffbb00, MI 0x30012b32/0x30005b5b/0x3000bbff); x0=x2=sX+orient*sOuterX, x1=copy, **NOTE(claude) #2 CONFIRMED (ASM 0x80050374 y0=sY-0xc)** NOT copy of T1 y0 (old bug doubled height), y1=sY-12, y2=sY+sVar5-12.

- **Anim state** (local[]=checkerFlagVariables[0..4]; ghidra folds onto cfv directly): Step1 local[4]+=local[3]*(first:elapsedTimeMS/main:0x40), var1=local[4]>>5; Step2 var1>0xfff→local[4]&=0x1ffff, local[0]+=0x200/local[2]+=200, local[1]=(sin(local[0])+0xfff)*0x20>>0xd+0x96, local[3]=(sin(local[2])+0xfff)*0x40>>0xd+0xb4; Step3 var2=(sin(var1)+0xfff)*local[1]>>0xd+0x280; Step4 var1+=0xc80, lightL=sin(var1)+0xfff; Step5 pos.vy=0xfc72/fcd0/fd2e; Step6 time=ElapsedTime@0x4ec>>5(first)/+=0x100(main), flagPos=-0xbbe-Position@0x4d8, pos.vx=flagPos(+=100 main).
- **TOGGLE/ping-pong RESOLVED**: proj toggle=0 + first-iter unroll (posL=scratchpad[-1], writes via posL+1 = 0x1f800000 = ghidra pScratchL) → main col=1 posL=0x1f800074/posR=0x1f800000 = ghidra toggle=1 init. -1/-4 base never deref'd (incr before read). CTR_NATIVE scratchpadBuf[0x1000] mirrors 0x1f800000 exactly. ✓
- Mesh: vz=(s16)var2+(s16)(sin(var1)+0xfff)*0x20>>0xd; ldv3/rtpt/stsxy3; vy+=0x11a/row. Clip: (posR[0]&posR[1]&posL[0]&posL[1]&0x80008000)==0 && (dims-each & 0x80008000)==0.
- **NOTE(claude) #1 CONFIRMED**: cols 1..34 (`for col<35` = ghidra `0x22<col→ret`); old=36 (extra strip). **NOTE(claude) #2 CONFIRMED**: per-POLY_G4 `p>guardEnd→cursor=p;return` = ghidra `curr<=endMin100` re-read (old had no bound=overflow).
- **Shading MATCH (algebraic)**: ghidra colorR light=`iLightR*0x82+(0x2000-iLightR)*0xff>>0xd` = `-125·x+0x1fe000>>0xd` = CalculateBrightness(lightR,false); dark=`*0x69+(0x2000-x)*0xa0` = `-55·x+0x140000` = CalcBright(lightR,true). Proj unifies both into CalculateBrightness. boolDark=((col>>2)+(i>>2))&1. POLY_G4: r0=r2=CalcBright(lightR,dark), r1=r3=CalcBright(lightL,dark); x0=posR[0],x1=posL[0],x2=posR[1],x3=posL[1]; setPolyG4 (len8,code0x38); OT link *p=*ot|0x8000000, *ot=p&0xffffff (std addPrim, OT high-byte 0). i==0→skip first cell+posL++. Final: cursor=p, ElapsedTime+=elapsedTimeMS*100. ✓ ALL MATCH.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-10) — SelectProfile.c batch 6 (7 FSM helpers vs AllProfiles_MenuProc @0x800490c4) — Match (no confirmed bugs; 1 flagged for call-site)
Retail AllProfiles_MenuProc is a monolithic ~350-line FSM; project split into ~18 statics. Verified helpers against inlined decompile chunks:
- **IsGhostMode** — Mode()==0x30 = _g_nProfileModeFlags==0x30. **AdvProfileOccupied(slot)** — MemcardProfile()->advProgress[slot].characterID>=0 = FSM `*(short*)(dwArg+slot*0x50+0x2e)>=0` (charID@profile+0x2a, profile@dwArg+slot*0x50+4). ✓
- **CopyGameProgressToCard** — RaceConfig_SaveGameOptions+GAMEPROG_SaveCupProgress+SyncGameAndCard(dwArg+0x144)+memcpy = decompile unrolled 4-word copy loop. ✓
- **LoadAdvProfile(slot)** — sync, advProgress=memcard->advProgress[slot] (0x50B), characterIDs[0]=charID, name→prevNameEntered. ✓
- **SaveAdvProfile(slot)** — bDoSave adv path: unk_8008d73C=slot, CopyGameProgressToCard, advProgress[slot] copy, SetIcon(0), StartMemcardAction(3), MemcardRefreshState=1, ActionActive=1. advProgress-copy vs gameProgress-copy order-swap SAFE (disjoint: slot3 ends dwArg+0x144 = gameProgress start). ✓
- **StartGhostSave** — time=drivers[0]?timeElapsedInRace:0x8ca00, GhostEncodeProfile(rowSelected,charID[0],levelID,time,prevNameEntered), ghostAddIdx=rowSelected/deleteIdx (rowSelected<numGhosts), SetIcon(1), StartMemcardAction(6), ActionActive=1, gameModeEnd|=PLAYER_GHOST_BEAT. ✓
- **GhostRowCount(savedCount,canChooseEmptySlot)** — count=clamp(numGhostProfilesSaved,[0,7]); memcardAction==1→canChoose=freeBytes>=0x3e00, count+=, >7→7/canChoose=0; else canChoose=1,count++. = FSM ghost-row calc for realistic 0-7 saves (proj defensive count>7→7 clamp harmless, numSavedGhosts always<=7). ✓
- ⚠️ **ClampRow(menu,rowCount) FLAGGED**: proj guards `(rowCount>0) && rowSelected>=rowCount → rowCount-1`; decompile inline clamp `uNumRows<=rowSelected → rowSelected=uNumRows-1` sets rowSelected=-1 when uNumRows==0 (ghost-save mode, 0 saves + card full freeBytes<0x3e00). Need main-proc call-site to confirm the `>0` guard doesn't change -1 behavior. DEFER.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — HOWL_Engine.c batch 2 (EngineSound_Player/AI/NearestAIs + 7 static helpers) — Match (no bugs) — ★ FILE + HOWL TRANCHE 100% COMPLETE
- **EngineSound_Player @0x8002f5f4** — 3-mode synth (engineSoundMode 0=FADE_OUT / 1=FADE_IN / else main-racer RPM model). Project factors the common pan(0x80-(wheelRotation>>0x13), clamp 0x40..0xc0)/pack(vol<<0x10|distort<<8|lr)/echo(actionsFlagSet&0x10000→|0x1000000) TAIL out to after the if/else; Ghidra DUPLICATES it per-mode with `goto LAB_8002fc04`. Equivalent. REVVING blend `pitchState*0x40 + (fireSpeed>0?0x3000:0)*0x30 + speedometerNeedleValue*0x90 >>8`; vol accum slew (±500/+2000, drift floor 2000, clamp 0..14000); pitch smooth `(target*0x89+state*0x177)>>9`; bot(0x100000) picks volMax 0xbe/pitchMax 0xbe vs 0xe6/200; distort = MapToRange(pitchState,0,scale+SacredFire+0xf00,0x3c,max) ∓ (turnWobbleAngle>>0x13 |abs|) + sfxDistortOffset(drift accum: turboRoom==0→dec-if-nonzero, else (turboMaxRoom>>1)-(room>>6)). FIELD NAMES: nSteerKickAngle→turnWobbleAngle@0x3D4, nSpeedometerNeedle→speedometerNeedleValue@0x36E, const_SpeedometerScale_ClassStat→const_AccelSpeed_ClassStat@0x42E (same offsets). ✓
- **EngineSound_AI @0x8002fc64** (+GetTargetPitch/UpdateSmoothing/CalculateVolume/CalculateDistortion) — monolith in Ghidra, split to 4 helpers in project; composition bit-identical. vol=MapToRange(volState,0,scale,0x82,0xe6), dist-attenuated `if(200<distance) MapToRange(distance,200,2000,vol,0)` (`slti 0xc9`=distance>200), 0 if dist>=2000; distort=MapToRange(pitchState,0,scale,0x3c,0xaa)-clamp(pitchSkew>>3,-0x14..0x14); LR/distort clamp; echo from cameraDriver->actionsFlagSet&0x10000; EngineAudio_Recalculate(aiSlot+0x10,...). ✓
- **EngineSound_NearestAIs @0x8002ff28** (+GetDistance/InsertClosest/CalculateLR) — bot gate `if(numBotsNextGame==0)return`; ROBOT(1) thread bucket @gGT+0x1b40, iterate siblings(+0x10)/object(+0x30); per-AI per-player SquareRoot0 dist to pushBuffer[p].pos(stride 0x110,pos@+0x168); keep 2 closest (InsertClosest cascade); then per-slot GTE_AudioLR_Driver(&pushBuffer[p].matrix_Camera@+0x1d0), CalculateLR (`ratan2(dx,-dz)+0x800`, `sll20;neg;sra23`, ±0x80/0x81 fold), slew pan, EngineSound_AI(ai, cameraDC[p].driverToFollow@stride0xdc+0x14dc, slot, dist, dist-prevDist, lr). ✓
- **NOTE(claude) @0x8002ff50 CONFIRMED via ASM**: `lbu v0,0x1cab(v1)` — gate reads offset **0x1cab=numBotsNextGame**, NOT 0x1caa=numBotsCurrGame (inner player loop reads 0x1ca8=numPlyrCurrGame). Authoritative.
- **audioDefaults[] flattening VERIFIED against exact data addresses**: project consolidates Ghidra's 3 separate int[2] globals into `sdata->audioDefaults` — `g_anAIEngineVol`=0x8008d818 (`lui0x8009;addiu-0x27e8`)→[0,1], `g_anAIEnginePrevDist`=0x8008d820(-0x27e0)→[2,3], `g_anAIEnginePan`=0x8008d828(-0x27d8)→[4,5]. Contiguous, stride 4, order vol/prevDist/pan EXACTLY matches project's [slot]/[2+i]/[4+i] indexing. Non-observable rename, bit-exact aliasing.
**★ HOWL_Engine.c 100% COMPLETE (11 fns: 3 EngineAudio_* + VolumeAdjust + Player + AI + NearestAIs + 7 statics). Zero bugs. NOTE(claude) numBotsNextGame + all NOTE(aalhendi) confirmed. ★★ HOWL TRANCHE 100% COMPLETE (Channel/OtherFX/Voiceline/Playback/Engine — 5 files).** Next: GAMEPAD, Podium_0_InitModels, namespace_* headers, deferred BOTS_ThTick_Drive.

New criterion:
- **Multi-array→flat-array aliasing rule (HOWL audioDefaults)**: when a project collapses several of Ghidra's separately-named globals into one indexed array, VERIFY the collapse against actual data addresses (disassemble the `lui/addiu` base of each global) — the flattening is only correct if the globals are contiguous in memory in the exact index order the project assumes. Here vol@0x8008d818/prevDist@+8/pan@+0x10 (stride 4) confirmed the [slot]/[2+i]/[4+i] layout is bit-exact. A wrong assumed order would silently cross-wire the three per-AI arrays.

- **Podium_InitModels @0x80041c84** — clears podium_modelIndex_First/Second/Third(0x2575/76/77)=0, tawna(0x2578)=STATIC_TAWNA1(0x8f); scan drivers[0..7]@gGT+0x24ec (ptr stride 4); per finisher with rank(s16@0x482) in {0,1,2}: podium_modelIndex_[rank] = characterID + STATIC_CRASHDANCE(0x7e); rank0 winner also picks tawna model by characterID. characterID = low byte of g_awCharacterIDs[driverID@0x4a] (`lbu` @base+driverID*2, g_awCharacterIDs@0x80086e84) == project `u8 characterID = data.characterIDs[driverID]`. ✓
- **Tawna switch bit-exact** vs retail jump table @0x80011600 (sltiu<8 bound): cid 0/3→TAWNA2(0x90), 1/4→TAWNA4(0x92), 6/7→TAWNA3(0x91), else→TAWNA1(0x8f). Constants confirmed namespace_Instance.h:183/200-203 (CRASHDANCE=0x7E, TAWNA1..4=0x8F..0x92). ✓
- **NOTE(claude) @0x80041d0c rank-guard CONFIRMED**: retail dispatches ranks via `beq v1,1`(Second) / `slti v0,v1,0x2`(SIGNED, at 0x80041ccc) then `beq v1,0`(First+tawna) / `beq v1,2`(Third); the signed `<2` test lets negative ranks fall through to `j 0x80041dac` (skip, no write). Project `if(rank>=0 && rank<3) podiumModelIndexArr[rank]=...` is equivalent — the `rank>=0` half is REQUIRED to stop a stray -1 indexing arr[-1]=0x2574 (byte before First). Retail structure (explicit 0/1/2 equality arms) and project (guarded array index) produce identical writes for all reachable ranks. ✓

Bucket query (posCurr>>8 vec, th=NULL, bestDistSq=0x7fffffff); `flags & 0x1800`(DEAD|DISABLE_COLLISION)==0: PLAYER→sibling+threadBuckets[ROBOT=1], ROBOT_CAR→sibling; hit→combinedRadius=driverHitRadius+hit->driverHitRadius(@0x42), distSq<r²→selfVel=(speed+aiPhysics.accel).xyz, VehPhysCrash_AnyTwoCars (=ghidra DriverCrash_AnyTwoCars). ✓

DEMO_CAMERA_STARTED(0x100)+CAM_EndOfRace; STARTLINE_INIT_DONE(0x200): OXIDE Voiceline_RequestPlay(0,0xf,0x10), (spawnOrder<3 && RNG&0xff<0x40)||OXIDE→VehFire_Increment(bot,0x2d0,FREEZE_RESERVES_ON_TURBO_PAD=1,0x180)+VehFire_Audio(0x180). **Boss path change** (botFlags&0xc0==0x40): opcode=next.pathChangeOpcode, PathID=(s16)op>>10, FrameIdx=op&0x3ff, cap=NAV_PATH_COUNT(3)<<10=0xc00; op<cap && PathID==desiredPath_BossOnly→set ACTIVE(0x80), LIST_Remove(oldPath)/AddFront(newPath), botNavFrame=array[newPath]+frameIdx, SetRotation(0). **Rank-catchup path change** (else, `0x1c2 < aiCollisionDelayFrameCount`=CTR_SECONDS_TO_FRAMES(15)=450 ✓, !ESTIMATE_NAV): scan navBotList[botPath], recover Driver via (item−0xb3)=`(char*)botData−offsetof(Driver,botData)`, skip self, iVar13=signed navframe-index diff (compiler magic `*0xCCCCCCCD>>` = /sizeof(NavFrame)=20), wrap +numPoints if <0, track min→otherDriver; otherDriver && (s16)min<3 && distToFinish diff<0x200 (wrap +distToFinish<<3) && op<0xc00→same path swap. ✓

Identical for the reachable domain (navframe diffs 0..numPoints, iVar3≤1000, all < 32768 so s16==s32). Project correctly truncates the *saved* `sVar7=(short)iVar3` for the `<3` gate, matching retail's `sScratch12`. Not a bug.

Ghidra's `trap(0x1c00)`/`trap(0x1800)` between the muls = MIPS div-by-0/INT_MIN overflow guards, correctly `#if 0`'d in project (CTR_MipsDiv handles natively). ✓

- **botVelocity catch-up formula (1268–1311)** — abs(complex)/abs(other); `other*(((abs+0x80)<<0xc)/0xa00)>>0xc`; local_38=uCatchupMul=(0<complex) [the NOTE(aalhendi) boost-scale, overwrites init 1 here]; `+= (v<<3/100)*(7−driverRank)`; clamp to iVar9, neg if other<0; +additionalVelocity from wumpa(cap9)/turbo(cap5)/**const_AccelSpeed_ClassStat==ghidra const_SpeedometerScale_ClassStat** netSpeedStat `((accel−speed)*0x1000/5)−1`, cap 0x6900; final clamp [0x1c20, 24000/0x5dc0]. ✓
- **reserves/fireSpeedCap/damage (1314–1325+)** — reserves==0→clear BOT_FLAG_NAV_BOOST_ACTIVE(0x10, `&0xffffffef`); else no-boost→+fireSpeedCap, boost→fireSpeedCap+10000; clockReceive||squishTimer→`*0xc00>>0xc`; !BOT_FLAG_DAMAGE_ACTIVE(0x2, ghidra BOT_REACTING) & (instTntRecv||thCloud)→−(const_DamagedSpeed>>1) [ghidra `(ushort)x<<0x10>>0x11` = (s16)>>1]. ✓

Sections verified this cycle (project 1543–1692):
- **Nav-advance do-while body (1543–1606)** — navFrameCurr=navFrameNext; deltaPos−=navDist<<8; navFrameNext=curr+1 (wrap at ->last); **Killplane**: `positionBackup.y>>8 < navFrameNext->pos[1] && (navFrameCurr->flags & KILLPLANE 0x200)`→BOTS_Killplane; accumulate navFrameFlags/navFrameSpecialBits; boss-path flag clear `&= (BOSS_PATH_ACTIVE 0x80 ? ~0xc1=0xffffff3e : ~1=0xfffffffe)`; **air-seg latch**: `(latch==0 && (byte)(rot[3]-0x31) > 0x9e)`→ !TOUCH_GROUND?XZ(nSegLenAir):XYZ(nSegLenGround) [no latch set], else→latch=1 + XZ(nSegLenAir) [ghidra goto LAB_8001509c skips latch=1 for the air case]; RAMP_PHYS(0x10)→local_3c. loop `while(navDist<=iVar15)`. ✓
- **Nav-flags→action-flags remap (1608–1623)** — navProgressRemainder=deltaPos; navActionFlags=(navFrameFlags&BACK_SKID 0x2)<<10 [=ACTION_BACK_SKID 0x800]; ENGINE_ECHO(0x2000)→ACTION_ENGINE_ECHO(0x10000); FRONT_SKID(0x4)→ACTION_FRONT_SKID(0x1000); clear `&~0x11800`, OR in. **Ghidra stages FRONT_SKID into actionsFlagSet directly & ENGINE_ECHO/BACK into navActionFlags; project stages all 3 into navActionFlags — OR'd final result identical.** ✓
- **Terrain/reflective/alpha (1625–1653)** — terrainMeta1=VehAfterColl_GetTerrain((byte)flags>>3); REFLECTIVE(0x20)→vertSplit=splitLines[specialBits&0xf?1:0]+inst.flags|=REFLECTIVE; `(specialBits & 0x30)==0 && !DYNAMIC_GHOST`→ transparency=(specialBits&0xf)*0x9c00, alphaScaleBackup/inst.alphaScale = ((u16)a*100+transparency)>>8. ✓
- **★ NOTE(claude) drift-mask turbo gate @0x80015240 — RE-CONFIRMED CORRECT vs ASM ★** — ASM `lw t3,0x6c(sp); andi v0,t3,0x1800`: sp+0x6c decompiles to **navFrameFlags (raw nav accumulator)**, ANDed with 0x1800 = **BOTS_NAV_FLAG_DRIFT_MASK (DRIFT_LEFT 0x800 | DRIFT_RIGHT 0x1000)**. Project line 1662 `(actionsFlagSet & ACTION_FRONT_SKID 0x1000)==0 || (navFrameFlags & BOTS_NAV_FLAG_DRIFT_MASK)==0`→reset turbo. **The bug this fixes**: ACTION_BACK_SKID(0x800)|ACTION_FRONT_SKID(0x1000) ALSO ==0x1800, so a naive `navActionFlags & (BACK|FRONT_SKID)` compiles & masks the same bits but reads the WRONG WORD; since gate-1 already implies navActionFlags has FRONT_SKID, that test was always-true → drift requirement bypassed, bots charged turbo on any front-skid segment. Project tests the RAW navFrameFlags — matches retail exactly. **Ghidra decompile confirms `navFrameFlags & 0x1800`.** ✓ (this is one of the 143 fixes)
- **Turbo charge tree (1670–1692, partial)** — else-branch: actionsFlagSet|=ACTION_TURBO_INPUT_LATCH(0x80); turboMeter=(s16)((u16)turboMeter+elapsedMS); nested threshold tree `<0xb41/0x961/0x781/0x5a0/0x3c1/0x1e0` × fireLevel gates → SetTurboChargeThreshold(=LAB_800153d0: fireLevel=uVar6, turbo_MeterRoomLeft=0xa0) or fireLevel-set + VehFire_Increment(...,POWER_SLIDE_HANG_TIME 0x2, uCatchupMul<<{7,8}/×0x180). Structure matches through fireLevel=2 branch; rest next cycle. ✓
- **Constants confirmed**: NAV_FLAG KILLPLANE=0x200/BACK_SKID=0x2/FRONT_SKID=0x4/ENGINE_ECHO=0x2000/DRIFT_LEFT=0x800/DRIFT_RIGHT=0x1000/DRIFT_MASK=0x1800; NAV_SPECIAL REFLECTIVE=0x20/INDEX_MASK=0xf; ACTION BACK_SKID=0x800/FRONT_SKID=0x1000/ENGINE_ECHO=0x10000/TURBO_INPUT_LATCH=0x80; POWER_SLIDE_HANG_TIME=0x2.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — BOTS_ThTick_Drive @0x80013c18 batch 9 (turn-steer + wiggle + ConvertRotToMatrix + velocity + hazardTimer + tail) — ★★ REAL BUG FOUND → Fix 144 ★★ — ★ FUNCTION 100% COMPLETE ★
Final section (project 2304–2687). **BUILD: exit 0 (clean).**
- **Turn-angle rot interp + steer slew (2304–2413)** — rot[3] gate `(byte)(rot[3]−0x31)>0x9e` for cur AND next; !ESTIMATE_NAV(1) && TOUCH_GROUND→ interp ai_rot4[0]/[2] (12-bit shortest-delta lerp by percentage); ai_rot4[1] always; ESTIMATE_NAV→deltaY=0; turnAngleCurr slew: `(2*deltaY − turnAngleCurr)&0xfff` clamp ±0x20; simpTurnState = driftTarget==0?(turnDelta wrapped>>2):((−mulDrift)&0xfff wrapped>>3); wheelRotation slew toward simpTurnState ±0x20; Driver.simpTurnState=(s8)aiPhysics.simpTurnState. ✓
- **★ Fix 144 — bad-effect kart-wiggle (2420–2437, real bug) ★** — ASM 0x80016478/88/98: `bne clockReceive(@0xc)→wiggle`, `bne squishTimer(@0x404)→wiggle` (phase=squishTimer), `beq thCloud(@0x4a0),zero→skip`. Retail wiggles iff clockReceive≠0 OR squishTimer≠0 OR (both0 && thCloud). **Project's nested `if(clockReceive==0){squishTimer; if(squishTimer==0){...thCloud...}}` with the wiggle label trapped in the `else` MISSED the (clockReceive==0 && squishTimer≠0) case → squished-but-not-clocked kart lost its shake.** FIX: added `else { goto badEffectKartWiggle; }` to the inner squishTimer==0 check (badnessRecieveTimer already holds squishTimer). NOTE(claude) added @asm 0x80016488. **Fix counter 143→144.**
- **Wiggle GTE + application (2438–2463)** — wiggleX/Z = MATH_Sin/Cos(badnessTimer*0xc)*50>>10; gte_ldv0({wX,0,wZ})+gte_mvmva(1,0,0,3,0)=rtv0; turboMeter=0; rotCurr.x/y/z += MFC2(25/26/27) (rotated vec). ✓
- **ConvertRotToMatrix ×2 + kinematics (2466–2527)** — `!(botFlags & 9)`→ ConvertRotToMatrix(navFrameCurr->rot<<4)→AxisAngle3_normalVec=col1 + bitCompressed; ConvertRotToMatrix(&inst.matrix, &rotCurr.x)→AxisAngle2_normalVec=col1; angle=rotCurr.y; speedApprox=speed=speedLinear; jumpHeightPrev=jumpHeightCurr; axisRotationX=ai_rot4[1]&0xfff; jumpHeightCurr=speedY*MATH_Cos(rot[3])>>0xc; zSpeed=speedLinear*Cos(axisRotationX)>>0xc, xSpeed=speedLinear*Sin>>0xc, ySpeed=speedY; rotCurr.z&0xfff wrap; rotCurr.y+=mulDrift+turnAngleCurr; posCurr=velocity+positionBackup; matrix.t=posCurr>>8 (+Screen_OffsetY on Y). ✓
- **hazardTimer (2529–2600) — SECOND clockReceive/squishTimer check, CORRECT (not the bug)** — here `if(clockReceive==0){squishTimer; if(squishTimer==0){idle-hazard; goto Finish}}` then fall-through to TOUCH_GROUND hazard-active path — **the fall-through is at OUTER scope (not trapped in else), so both either-nonzero cases correctly reach the hazard path.** speed>0x100→hazardTimer−=elapsedMS, &0xfffe, (s16)≥0→−2; else hazard=∓badnessTimer by TOUCH_GROUND/speed; |=1. ✓
- **Tail (2604–2687)** — LEVEL_INST_COLL(0x40)||(botFlags&9)→BOTS_LevInstColl; SPLIT_LINE nav(0x8000)→inst.flags|=SPLIT_LINE; VehPhysForce_TranslateMatrix/RotAxisAngle(matrixMovingDir); VehFrameProc_Driving; **BLAST flip** (DAMAGE_ACTIVE && aiDamageState==BLAST): rotXZ<<8/rotXZ*0xe0 matrix, MatrixMul ×2 (sdata->rotXZ/rotXYZ=ghidra g_botFlip*), t[1]+=0x20; !SUPPRESS_EMITTER(0x4)→VehEmitter_DriverMain; DYNAMIC_PLAYER→EngineSound_Player; camRot=(angle−ai_rotY_608)&0xfff, rotCurr.w=−camRot, ai_rotY_608 slew >>3; DYNAMIC_PLAYER→under-driver BSP probe (quadFlagsIgnored=0, +0x40 bottom)→underDriver=ptrQuadblock. ✓
- **VehEmitter_DriverMain 2-arg call VERIFIED CORRECT (not a bug)**: ghidra shows `SpawnParticle_DriverMain(bot,driver,pSpawnMatrix,uScratch9)` 4-arg, but VehEmitter_DriverMain(@0x80059a18) is a **funcPtr-dispatched 2-arg fn** (d->funcPtrs[DRIVER_FUNC_PARTICLES], called `(thread,object)`) → can't read a2/a3; decompiler's extra args are dead leftover regs. Project's 2-arg call correct.
- **Constants confirmed**: BOTS_NAV_SPECIAL_LEVEL_INST_COLL=0x40, BOTS_NAV_FLAG_SPLIT_LINE=0x8000, BOT_FLAG_DAMAGE_SUPPRESS_EMITTER=0x4(=ghidra BOT_REACTION_IMMOBILE). QUADBLOCK query field offsets re-confirmed (+0x24 wanted, +0x28 ignored, +0x22 searchFlags; field6_0x16 = clear-a3 artifact).
**★★ BOTS_ThTick_Drive @0x80013c18 100% COMPLETE (9 batches, ~1900 project lines / 1413 decompile lines / ~0x354c bytes). 1 REAL BUG (Fix 144, wiggle miss), all NOTE(claude)/NOTE(aalhendi) confirmed. Build clean. ★★** This was the last major deferred function. Remaining modified /game: namespace_* headers (data defs, not fns).

New criterion:
- **Label-in-else goto trap**: when retail uses a fall-through/short-circuit (`if (A && (x=B, B==0))`) to REACH a shared block, a project transcription that puts the block's LABEL inside the `else` only reaches it via the else-entry or an explicit `goto` — it SILENTLY DROPS the "A-true-but-B-nonzero falls to else" path. Compare against the SECOND clockReceive/squishTimer block (correct: fall-through target at outer scope) vs the FIRST (buggy: wiggle trapped in else). When you see `if(P==0){Q; if(Q==0){...}}` mirroring an asm `bne P→L; bne Q→L`, confirm the L-block is reachable when P==0 && Q!=0.

New criterion:
- **Similar-name wrong-field trap (Fix 145)**: when a struct has near-homonym fields (numTimesAttack**ing**@0x559 vs numTimesAttack**ed**@0x57c), confirm the project write targets the SAME OFFSET the asm `sb/sh/sw` uses — a one-letter field-name slip compiles fine but writes the wrong memory. Read the store offset from the disassembly, then check the project field's `// 0x...` offset comment matches. Especially likely for stat/counter fields with parallel naming.

- **BOTS_Driver_Init @0x80017164** — AI-racer spawn. Nav-path walk (start driver_pathIndexIDs[driverID], decrement/wrap 0→2 until numPoints>1, NULL if all 3 checked): **project's `while(1){count; if>1 break; idx--; if<0 idx=2; if==initial return NULL}` == ghidra's flag-based `bFoundPath` loop — traced all-invalid-wrap case, equivalent.** PROC_BirthWithObject(SIZE_RELATIVE_POOL_BUCKET(DRIVER_NTSC_RETAIL_SIZE 0x62c,NONE,LARGE,ROBOT)=**0x62c0101**, BOTS_ThTick_Drive, 0, 0); memset(d,0,0x62c); VehBirth_NonGhost; gGT->drivers[driverID]=d; modelIndex=DYNAMIC_ROBOT_CAR(0x3f); botPath/botNavFrame; actionsFlagSet|=ACTION_BOT; LIST_AddFront(&navBotList[path], &d->botData[=nNavPathListNode@botData+0]); numBotsNextGame++; BOTS_GotoStartingLine. ✓
- **BOTS_Driver_Convert @0x80017318** — human→AI mid-race. !ACTION_BOT gate; UI_RaceEnd_GetDriverClock; same nav-path walk (return; if none); memset(&d->botData,0,sizeof(BotData)=0x94); speedY=ySpeed; botPath; speedLinear=abs(speedApprox); zero navProgressRemainder/turnAngleCurr/multDrift/ampTurnState/wallRubTimer[=set_0xF0_OnWallRub]; botNavFrame=array[path]; funcThTick=BOTS_ThTick_Drive; BATTLE_MODE→posCurr=header[path]->frame[0].pos<<8; LIST_AddFront; BOTS_SetRotation(d,0); GAMEPAD_JogCon2(d,0,0); **actionsFlagSet = (old & ~(ACTION_JUMP_BUTTON_HELD 0x4|ACTION_ACCEL_PREVENTION 0x8)=~0xc=0xfffffff3) | ACTION_BOT**; ACTION_RACE_FINISHED→CAM_EndOfRace; **switch(kartState): KS_SPINNING(3=DRIFTING|CRASHING)→ChangeState damageType 1, KS_BLASTED(6)→2, default return**; BOTS_ChangeState(d, dt, NULL, ATTACK_NONE 0). ✓
- **Constants confirmed**: DYNAMIC_ROBOT_CAR=0x3F, DRIVER_NTSC_RETAIL_SIZE=0x62c, ACTION_JUMP_BUTTON_HELD=0x4, KS_SPINNING=3, KS_BLASTED=6; sizeof(BotData)=0x94; field aliases wallRubTimer=set_0xF0_OnWallRub, botData node=nNavPathListNode@offset0.
**BOTS.c progress: ThTick_Drive, ChangeState, CollideWithOtherAI, GotoStartingLine, Driver_Init, Driver_Convert done (2 real bugs: Fix 144/145). Next: BOTS_ThTick_RevEngine @0x8001372c, BOTS_Killplane, BOTS_MaskGrab, BOTS_SetRotation + smaller helpers.**

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — BOTS.c SetRotation/LevInstColl/RevEngine/MaskGrab/Killplane (5 fns) — Match (no bugs) — ★ASM resolves 2 decompiler artifacts★
Continuing BOTS.c mid-body helpers.
- **BOTS_SetRotation @0x80013444** — aim bot at target nav frame: velocity=0, estimatePosition=(s16)(posCurr>>8) [arith vs logical shift equal after (s16) trunc], dx/dy/dz to nf->pos, distToNextNavXZ=SquareRoot0(dx²+dz²)/XYZ=+dy², estimateRotCurrY=(u8)(ratan2(dy<<0xc, XZ<<0xc)>>4); !useSpawnYaw→ estimateRotNav[0]=nf->rot[0], [1]=(u8)((ratan2(-dx,-dz)+0x800)>>4), **[2]=nf->rot[2]** else [1]=(u8)((DriverSpawn[0].rot[1]+0x400)>>4); yaw v=estimateRotNav[1]<<4 → ai_rotY_608/angle/rotCurr.y/rotPrev.y/ai_rot4[1]; botFlags|=BOT_FLAG_ESTIMATE_NAV. **NOTE(claude) CONFIRMED**: ghidra `lbu v0,0x8(s6)`=NavFrame->rot[2]@+0x8 (rot u8[4]@6); estimateRotNav[2] copies rot[2](roll), not rot[1](yaw@+0x7) — the old rot[1] fed nav yaw into roll estimate. Project reads rot[2] = matches. ✓
- **BOTS_LevInstColl @0x800135d8 — ★2 decompiler artifacts ASM-resolved★** — scratchpad: ASM 6 stores +0x22=1(searchFlags=TEST_INSTANCES), +0xc=0x3f(modelID), +0x24=0(quadFlagsWanted), +0x28=0(quadFlagsIgnored), +0x6=0x19(hitRadius), +0x2c(ptr_mesh_info) — **project's 6 assigns EXACT; decompile's `field6_0x16=0` is a PHANTOM (no +0x16 store).** pos via `sra` (arith, project CTR_MipsSra correct; decompile's `(uint)>>8` wrong), Y+0x19. COLL_FIXED_BotsSearch; countInstancesCollided(+0x42)!=0; searchFlags&=~COLL_SEARCH_REUSE_NORMALS(0x8); bspHitbox(+0x48)->flag(0)&BSP_HITBOX_COLLIDABLE(0x80). **★Union interpretation: ASM `lw 0x1c(bspHitbox)=instDef; lw 0x2c(instDef)=ptrInstance; lh 0x3c(instDef)=modelID` = project `data.hitbox.instDef->ptrInstance`/`instDef->modelID` EXACT. Decompile's `leaf.ptrQuadBlockArray->bbox.min`/`blockID` = struct-union misguess reading wrong offsets — project is ASM-faithful.** COLL_LevModelMeta(modelID)@0x8001d094; meta->pLInC(+0x8); pLInC(inst, thread, scratchpad). ✓
- **BOTS_ThTick_RevEngine @0x8001372c** — mask-grab descent tick: positionBackup.y<posCurr.y→ posCurr.y−=(elapsedMS<<9)>>5 [=*16], drag mask pos=posCurr>>8, VehPhysForce_TranslateMatrix+VehFrameProc_Driving+VehEmitter_DriverMain [2-arg vs ghidra SpawnParticle_DriverMain 4-arg = funcPtr-dispatch passthrough, project correct]; else→ mask scale=0x1000/duration=0/rot.z&=0xfffe, maskObj=NULL, kartState=KS_ENGINE_REVVING, clockReceive/squishTimer=0, ThTick_SetAndExec(BOTS_ThTick_Drive). ✓
- **BOTS_MaskGrab @0x80013838** — mask-grab recovery reposition: nextFrame wrap; kartState=MASK_GRABBED; navProgressRemainder=(distToNextNavXZ/2)<<8 [ghidra `(x−(x>>31))>>1` signed-div idiom]; midpointXYZ=(frame.pos+(next−frame)/2)<<8 → positionBackup/posPrev(+quadBlockHeight on Y); zero mulDrift/squishCooldown/reserved_0x5cc/speedY/speedLinear/velocity; actionsFlagSet|=ACTION_TOUCH_GROUND; **botFlags&=~0x4f (ESTIMATE_NAV|DAMAGE_ACTIVE|SUPPRESS_EMITTER|FREE_PHYSICS|BOSS_PATH_REQUESTED)**; rotCurr.xyz=frame.rot<<4; zero turbo/reserves/clockReceive/squishTimer/turbo_outsideTimer/matrixArray/matrixIndex; **actionsFlagSet&=~0x80040 (ACTION_AIRBORNE|ACTION_HIGH_JUMP 0x40)**; !DYNAMIC_GHOST→flags&=~THREAD_FLAG_DISABLE_COLLISION; posCurr=positionBackup, posCurr.y+=BOTS_MASK_DROP_HEIGHT(0x10000); mask=VehPickupItem_MaskUseWeapon(bot,1), duration=BOTS_MASK_DURATION(0x1e00), rot.z|=1; ThTick_SetAndExec(RevEngine). ✓
- **BOTS_Killplane @0x80013a70** — off-track nav rewind: strcmp(levelName,"asphalt2")→ Tiny Arena override switch(checkpoint.currentIndex@0x495): 0x94→0x84, 0xa0→0x80, else 0xff (ghidra −0x6c/−0x60 = signed 0x94/0xa0); if !=0xff walk botNavFrame back while (goBackCount<override−1)||(override+1<goBackCount), wrap frame<array→header->last[−1]. Else (general): walk back while goBackCount==currentIndex || flags&0x4000. BOTS_MaskGrab(thread). ✓
- **Constants confirmed**: BOTS_MASK_DROP_HEIGHT=0x10000, BOTS_MASK_DURATION=0x1e00, ACTION_HIGH_JUMP=0x40, COLL_SEARCH_TEST_INSTANCES=1, COLL_SEARCH_REUSE_NORMALS=0x8, BSP_HITBOX_COLLIDABLE=0x80, DRIVER field checkpoint.currentIndex@0x495. Field offsets: instDef@bspHitbox+0x1c, ptrInstance@instDef+0x2c, modelID@instDef+0x3c, pLInC@meta+0x8.
**BOTS.c progress: 11 fns done (ThTick_Drive/ChangeState/CollideWithOtherAI/GotoStartingLine/Driver_Init/Driver_Convert/SetRotation/LevInstColl/RevEngine/MaskGrab/Killplane). 2 real bugs (Fix 144/145), all NOTE(claude)/NOTE(aalhendi) confirmed. Next: BOTS smaller helpers (BOTS_PathChange* inlines already covered, RngDeadCoed, any remaining).**

New criterion:
- **Decompiler struct-union misguess (BOTS_LevInstColl)**: Ghidra picks ONE arm of a C union to model a field (e.g. bspHitbox->data as `leaf.ptrQuadBlockArray` reading offset 0/blockID), but the ASM reads a DIFFERENT arm (`hitbox.instDef` → +0x1c/+0x2c/+0x3c). When the project's field path disagrees with the decompile on a union member, disassemble the actual `lw/lh` offsets — the project is often ASM-faithful and the decompile guessed the wrong union arm. Same for phantom struct writes (`field6_0x16=0`) with no backing store.

(ghidra dropped index param → in_a1; project 2-param correct; both ignore gGT param, use sdata_gGT). ✓

- **BOTS_Adv_AdjustDifficulty @0x80012598 (huge, plate-noted "not line-verified") — difficulty MATH fully verified, spawn-order data tables match structure** —

  - **Difficulty scalar (all 5 branches)**: ARCADE→(u16)arcadeDiff (CHEAT_SUPERHARD→0x140), cupDiff=+0x50; CUP(cupID==4: track*5−(lost−0xe1), CHEAT track*7−(lost−0x141); else −0xcd/−300), cupDiff=curr+0x50 [timesLostCupRace@advProgress+0x42]; BOSS: bossID*5−(lost−0xe1), CHEAT *7−(lost−0x141) [timesLostBossRace@+0x47]; LEVEL: (numTrophies+1)*0x23>>2−(lost−0x3c), CHEAT (nT+1)*0xc−(lost−100) [timesLostRacePerLev@+CREDITS_N_GIN]. (s16)curr<0→0. **All match ghidra branch-for-branch.** ✓

- **Constants confirmed**: ADV_MAX_LOSS=10, DIFFICULTY_PARAM_COUNT=14, BLEND_DENOM=0xf0, NAV_PATH_COUNT=3, ADVENTURE_BOSS=0x80000000, NavHeader magic=0xECFD(-0x1303), NavFrame stride 0x14.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — BOTS.c UpdateGlobals @0x80013374 — Match (no bugs) — ★★ BOTS.c FILE 100% COMPLETE ★★
- **BOTS_UpdateGlobals @0x80013374** — per-frame AI bookkeeping: numBotsNextGame!=0→EngineSound_NearestAIs; scan driversInRaceOrder[7..0] (BOTS_MAX_KARTS=8, ghidra `(i<<0x10)>>0xe`=i*4 word-offset), NULL→skip, ACTION_BOT(0x100000)→ (bestRobotRank==0→worstRobot=d) + bestRobotRank=d, else→bestHumanRank=d; bestHumanRank==NULL→worstRobot; aiCollisionDelayFrameCount++. **Ghidra's nested comma-op condition `((d!=0 && (pBH=d, isRobot)) && (pBH=bestHuman, bestRobot=d, worstRobot==NULL))→worstRobot=d; bestHuman=pBH` DECODES EXACTLY to project's if/else** — traced 3 cases (NULL/human/robot); `bestRobotRank==0`(project, pre-set) ≡ `pWorstRobot==NULL`(ghidra, post-set) both trigger on first robot. aiCollisionDelayFrameCount++ hoisted in ghidra (position-independent). ✓
**★★ BOTS.c 100% COMPLETE — 18 functions verified ★★** (SetGlobalNavData, InitNavPath, EmptyFunc, Adv_NumTimesLostEvent, Adv_AdjustDifficulty[+2 statics], UpdateGlobals, SetRotation, LevInstColl, ThTick_RevEngine, MaskGrab, Killplane, ThTick_Drive, ChangeState, CollideWithOtherAI, GotoStartingLine, Driver_Init, Driver_Convert). **2 REAL BUGS FOUND: Fix 144 (ThTick_Drive bad-effect wiggle miss, clockReceive==0&&squishTimer!=0), Fix 145 (ChangeState numTimesAttacking vs numTimesAttacked wrong field @0x559).** All NOTE(claude)/NOTE(aalhendi) confirmed against ASM. Multiple decompiler artifacts resolved (union misguess, phantom field write, enum-mangled Killplane bit, comma-op conditions, 4-arg funcPtr passthrough). **Build clean. Fix counter: 145.** BOTS.c was the largest unverified /game file — now done.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — Vehicle/VehCalc.c (4 fns) + Vehicle/VehAfterColl.c (2 fns) — Match (no bugs) — ★ BOTH FILES 100% COMPLETE
Post-BOTS.c: starting the Vehicle/ tranche with the small heavily-referenced math/lookup helpers.
- **VehCalc_InterpBySpeed @0x80058f54** — ease `val` toward `desired` by ≤`speed`: val>desired→val−=speed clamp≥desired; else val+=speed clamp≤desired. **Ghidra's comma-op else `(target<=current)||(iResult=target, iStepped=current+maxStep, current+maxStep<=target)→iResult=iStepped` decodes exactly** (val==desired→desired; val<desired & val+speed<=desired→val+speed; else desired). ✓
- **VehCalc_MapToRange @0x80058f9c** — clamped linear remap: val<=oldMin→newMin, val>=oldMax→newMax, else newMin + (val−oldMin)*(newMax−newMin)/(oldMax−oldMin) [CTR_MipsDiv; ghidra div-guard traps]. The universal range helper used across the codebase. ✓
- **VehCalc_SteerAccel @0x8005900c** — 3-segment steer ramp: frame<stage2First→MapToRange(frame,0,stage2First,min,max); else stage3Start=stage2First+stage2Len, frame>stage3Start→MapToRange(frame,stage3Start,stage4First,max,0); else hold max. ✓
- **VehCalc_FastSqrt @0x80059070** — base-4 digit-by-digit integer sqrt: testBit=1<<(shift&0x1f), grow while <n; addBit=1<<((rootBitIndex+shift−1)&0x1f); loop testBit>>=2: shiftedResult=result<<rootBitIndex (or >>−rootBitIndex if s32<0), approx=shifted+lastApprox+testBit, approx<=n→result+=addBit/lastApprox=approx; addBit>>=1, rootBitIndex−−. Project while-loop == ghidra for-loop, bit-exact. ✓
- **VehAfterColl_GetSurface @0x80057c44** — scrubId<7→&MetaDataScrub[scrubId] else [0](SOLID); struct Scrub stride 0x10 (_Static_assert). ghidra `6<(uint)scrubId` = project `scrubId<7`. ✓
- **VehAfterColl_GetTerrain @0x80057c68** — terrainType<=TERRAIN_SLOWDIRT(20=0x14, last of 21-entry enum @namespace_Level.h:72-92)→&MetaDataTerrain[terrainType] else [0](ASPHALT); struct Terrain stride 0x40 (_Static_assert). ghidra `0x14<(uint)terrainType`. ✓
- **Constants confirmed**: TERRAIN_SLOWDIRT=0x14 (TERRAIN_ASPHALT=0..SLOWDIRT=20), sizeof(Terrain)=0x40, sizeof(Scrub)=0x10.
**★ VehCalc.c (4/4) + VehAfterColl.c (2/2) COMPLETE. Zero bugs. Next Vehicle/ files: VehLap(84), VehPhysJoystick(88), VehTalkMask(164), VehPickState, VehFrame, VehTurbo, ... up to the big VehPhysProc(2438)/VehStuckProc(1580).**

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — Vehicle/VehPhysJoystick.c (3 fns) + Vehicle/VehLap.c (1 fn) — Match (no bugs) — ★ BOTH FILES 100% COMPLETE
- **VehPhysJoystick_ReturnToRest @0x8006163c** — center stick: rwd?rwd:&rwd_default{center 0x80,dead 0x30,range 0x7f}; stickVal−=gamepadCenter; <0→−MapToRange(−v,dead,range,0,half), else MapToRange(v,dead,range,0,half). ✓
- **VehPhysJoystick_GetStrength @0x800616b0** — 2-segment steer curve: rwd?rwd:{0x30,0x7f,dist=0x5e}; val<dead→0; dead=val−dead; range<=val→max; halfDist=dist/2 (signed `(dist+(dist>>31))>>1`); maxFifth=max/5; halfDist<=dead→ ((dead−halfDist)*(max−maxFifth)*2)/dist + maxFifth, else (dead*maxFifth*2)/dist. ✓
- **VehPhysJoystick_GetStrengthAbsolute @0x800617cc** — signed wrapper: center=rwd?gamepadCenter:0x80; d=stickVal−center; <0→−GetStrength(−d,max,rwd) else GetStrength(d,max,rwd). ✓
- **VehLap_UpdateProgress @0x8005ca24** — track-progress/wrong-way update. checkpointIndex: AI=ai_quadblock_checkpointIndex, human=lastValid->checkpointIndex(skip if 0xff/-1); guard `(u32)(cnt_restart_points−1)>=0xff || checkpointIndex<0`. nodes: checkpointNode[idx]→progressNode[.nextIndex_forward]→nextNode[.nextIndex_forward]; **trackDir=normalize(progressNode.pos − nextNode.pos) (points BACKWARD, nextNode is further ahead)**. **GTE trick**: CTC2 packs matrix row1=posDelta(posCurr>>8 − progressNode.pos), row2=matrixMovingDir col2 `m[i][2]>>5`; gte_mvmva(0,0,0,3,0) → MAC1=projection(posDelta·trackDir), MAC2=facingDotTrack. distanceToFinish_curr = (progressNode.distToFinish<<3 + projection>>0xc) **% (nodes[0].distToFinish<<3)** [signed, NOTE(aalhendi) mfhi]. **facingDotTrack>=0x5a801→set ACTION_DRIVING_WRONG_WAY(0x100)** (aligned-with-backward-trackDir = wrong way; project name MORE accurate than ghidra plate's "forward"). branch: (ACTION_CHECKPOINT_BRANCH_PENDING 0x8000000 && checkpoint.currentIndex!=idx)→ branchChoiceIndex=idx + clear pending; checkpointNode.nextIndex_left!=0xff→set pending; checkpoint.currentIndex=idx. **Field rename lapCheckpointState[4]→checkpoint{branchChoiceIndex[0],currentIndex[1]}.** ✓
- **Constants confirmed**: ACTION_DRIVING_WRONG_WAY=0x100, ACTION_CHECKPOINT_BRANCH_PENDING=0x8000000, rwd_default{0x80,0x30,0x7f}, dist default 0x5e.

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — Vehicle/VehPickState.c (VehPickState_NewState @0x80064568) — Match (no bugs) — ★ FILE 100% COMPLETE
Human-driver hazard/hit reaction (parallel of BOTS_ChangeState for AI). Large fn.
- **Early-outs**: pendingDamageType=0; kartState==MASK_GRABBED→0; (ACTION_MASK_WEAPON 0x800000 || invincibleTimer!=0)→Voiceline(VOICE_BLOCKED 2)+return0; instBubbleHold→shield.flags(@+6)|=1, invincibleTimer=0x2a0, clear hold, Voiceline+return0; damageType==0→return1. ✓
- **Damage dispatch** (project clean if-else == ghidra goto-web LAB_800647c8/d8): 1=spin(NoInputTimer 0x3c0, kartState!=3→funcPtrs[0]=SpinFirst_Init); 2=blast/tumble(BLASTED or funcPtrs==Tumble→return0; funcPtrs=Tumble_Init, NoInputTimer 0x960, squishTimer=0, voice=HURT 1); 3=squish(kartState!=SPINNING→OtherFX_Play_Echo(0x5a,1,echo)+voice=4, NoInputTimer 0xf0, squishTimer 0xf00, →SpinFirst); 4=burn(burnTimer==0→OtherFX_Play(0x69,1)+voice=1, NoInputTimer 0x780, burnTimer 0xf00, →SpinFirst); 5=plant(NoInputTimer 0xd20, funcPtrs=PlantEaten_Init, voice=1). voice!=0→Voiceline. ✓
- **★ OtherFX_Play_Echo echo arg — VERIFIED benign★**: project passes `actionsFlagSet & ACTION_ENGINE_ECHO`(0/0x10000), ghidra `>>0x10 & 1`(0/1); callee does `if(echoFlag!=0) |=0x1000000` (HOWL_OtherFX.c:44) = boolean, both forms equivalent. ✓

- **VehPhysCrash_BounceSelf @0x8005cf64** — car-vs-car penetration resolve: diff=pos−origin, dot=(diff·normal)>>0xc; bounce gate (side==0→dot<0, side!=0→dot>0); vehicleCollisionImpactStrength[=g_nCrashMaxPenetration]=max(|dot|); pos[i]−=**Div6Shift9(dot*normal[i]) = (dot*normal[i])/0xc00** [magic 0x2aaaaaab=/6, >>9=/512, /3072=/0xc00; ghidra renders `/0xc00`]; +origin[i]; Y clamp `oldY<newY && newY>0x3200→0x3200`. ### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — Vehicle/VehPhysCrash.c batch 2 (Attack + AnyTwoCars, 2 of 5) — Match (no bugs) — ★ASM resolves decompiler register-aliasing that LOOKED like a bug★ FILE COMPLETE
- **VehPhysCrash_Attack @0x8005d218** — queue loser's hazard on driver1 (via pendingDamageType/ReasonByte/Attacker = ghidra cChangeState_damageType/attackKind/attacker): !ACTION_MASK_WEAPON(0x800000): (1) other invincible→ pendingType=2, reason=ATTACK_CRASH(6), FX(OtherFX_DriverCrashing(echo bit16, 0xff)+Voiceline HURT); (2) other has bubble & driver doesn't→ pop bubble(Shield.flags|=8, clear hold), pendingType=2, reason=ATTACK_NONE(0), FX + boolPlayBubblePop→OtherFX_Play(0x4f); (3) g_nCrashMaxPenetration>0xa00 && other.reserves && other.ACTION_TURBO_ITEM(0x200) && driver.reserves==0→ other.forcedJumpType=FORCED_JUMP_HIGH(2), pendingType=3, reason=ATTACK_SQUISH(5). return canPlayFeedback. ✓
- **VehPhysCrash_AnyTwoCars @0x8005d404** (project refactored ghidra's 4× inlined blocks into helpers WeightedAverage/WeightedVelocity/AddImpulse/SubImpulse/BouncePair/PlayHumanFeedback) — unit normal=pDelta<<0xc/dist (dist=0→{0,0,0x1000}); hitStrength=(driverHitRadius+otherHitRadius)−dist, ≤0→ret; g_nCrashMaxPenetration=0; **4-case AI dispatch (project inverts outer if, equivalent): both-human/this-human-other-AI → COM-velocity(nMass-weighted)+BouncePair+impulse-exchange, then feedback+Attack×2; this-AI-other-human → ConvertSpeedToVec+bounce+VehPhysCrash_AI(self)+ConvertVecToSpeed(other), return; both-AI → bounce+AI both+BOTS_CollideWithOtherAI, return.** feedback only on human-self path. canPlayFeedback=(frameTimer−lastCrashFrame[audioDefaults[8]]≥3); PlayHumanFeedback (impactStrength>0x200, PLAYER→ MapToRange vol[0,0x1900→0x3f,0xff], OtherFX_DriverCrashing+Voiceline5 if vol>0xdc, JogCon1 rumble simpTurnState>0?0x29:0x19, both |=ACTION_HUMAN_HUMAN_COLLISION 0x10000000). ✓
- **★★ BouncePair reset — ASM-RESOLVED, NOT a bug ★★**: ghidra decomp shows `VehPhysCrash_BounceSelf(...); if (massSumOrQuot[comVelZ] < 0) g_nCrashMaxPenetration=0`. **ASM 0x8005d6c0/6dc: `bgez v0`/`blez v0` — checks BounceSelf's RETURN (v0), NOT comVelZ (decompiler register-aliasing artifact).** BounceSelf returns **v0=0** (`clear v0; jr ra` @0x8005d0c0), so `<0`/`>0` are DEAD (never reset). **Project BouncePair `if(BounceSelf()<0)...if(BounceSelf()>0)...` with 0-returning BounceSelf reproduces the dead reset EXACTLY.** Trust ASM over decompiler when a "missed check" appears — the checked value may be a call-return the decompiler misattributed to an earlier same-register local.
- **Constants confirmed**: ACTION_MASK_WEAPON=0x800000, ACTION_TURBO_ITEM=0x200, FORCED_JUMP_HIGH=2, ACTION_HUMAN_HUMAN_COLLISION=0x10000000; ATTACK_CRASH=6/NONE=0/SQUISH=5; nMass=const_CollisionWeight@0x47c; audioDefaults[8]=g_nLastCrashSfxFrame(DAT_8008d838).

- **VehGroundShadow_Subset1 @0x8005b6b8** — copy icon texLayout to pDst + force tpage=(tpage & 0xff9f)|0x40 (ABR semitrans). Project memcpy+mask == ghidra per-field copy + packed-word `& 0xff9fffff | 0x400000`. ✓
- **VehGroundShadow_Main @0x8005b720** — 2 shadow tex via Subset1(scratch+0x224/0x230); prim+0x140 guard; SetTransVector(0). **Per-driver entry (BuildEntry)**: driver/inst/instFlags, idppFlags[player]=GetIdpp(inst,player).instFlags, pos={posCurr.x>>8, (quadBlockHeight>>8)+3, posCurr.z>>8}, depthBias=(SPLIT_LINE 0x2000?depthBiasSecondary:Normal)+1, state=0. **Per-player×driver projection**: SetGeomOffset(rect.w>>1[CTC2 rect.w<<15,24], rect.h>>1), SetGeomScreen(distanceToScreen_PREV), LoadGteRotMatrix(matrix_ViewProj); isLargeGeom=dist>0x100; skip if state==−1/HIDE_MODEL(0x80→state=−1)/!DRAW_SUCCESSFUL(0x40); diff=DiffS16(pos,cam), scaled=diff*4, !large→cull [−0x1770,0x1770] (iVar15==scaledX for cull-passing, no s16 overflow); rtv0→groundDistance=MAC3>>2, <−0x34 skip; color=large?0x2e1f1f1f: (dist<0x180?0x1f: fade=(0x200−dist)*0x1f, <0 +0x7f, >>7, <1 skip)→0x2e000000|i|i<<8|i<<16. **state==0→TransformLocalAxes** (height=0x100−((posCurr.y−quadBlockHeight)>>8) bounds[1,0x109] else state=−1, clamp 0x100; RotAxisAngle(AxisAngle3_normalVec, rotCurr.y)+SetLightMatrix; local axes height*{0x28,0x29,0x34}>>6 via llv0×3)+reload RotMatrix. **BuildProjectionPoints** (9-pt trapezoid from base±local[0]/[1]/[2]) → **ProjectPoints** (3× rtpt_b, MFC2 12-14/17-19) → **EmitQuad ×4** (quadPointIndex {8,0,1,2}/{8,0,7,6}/{4,0,3,2}/{4,0,5,6}, tex shadowTex1/0 by idx&1, depthIndex=(depth>>8)+depthBias clamp[0,0x3ff], tag|0x09000000, Ptr24). ✓
- **★Documented native divergence (NOT a bug)**: retail stages pointer-bearing shadow entries in PSX scratchpad 0x1f8000a4-0x208; project keeps them as **host-local `VehGroundShadowEntry entries[9]`** (own struct layout: local@0/state@0x12/depthBias@0x13/driver@0x14/... vs retail scratch state@0/depthBias@1/driver@2). NOTE(aalhendi) documents this — pointers can't safely live in GTE scratchpad. Field SEMANTICS match; offsets differ by design. GTE read_mt register fusion exempt (plate).
- **Constants confirmed**: DRAW_SUCCESSFUL=0x40, HIDE_MODEL=0x80, SPLIT_LINE=0x2000; color base 0x2e000000, FT4 tag 0x09000000, height factors 0x28/0x29/0x34, cull ±0x1771/0x1770.

Existing-mask reuse loop (childThread, modelIndex-STATIC_AKUAKU(0x39)<2): funcThTick=RB_MaskWeapon_ThTick, duration 0x1e00(<10 wumpa)/0x2d00, SFX soundID=modelIndex+0x1a (0x53 aku/0x54 uka), clear THREAD_FLAG_DEAD(0x800). New-mask: modelID=STATIC_UKAUKA(0x3a)-boolGoodGuy, INSTANCE_BirthWithThread(SMALL 0x300, OTHER, 0x14), kartState∉{KS_ENGINE_REVVING 4,KS_MASK_GRABBED 5} gates AKU_SONG/UKA_SONG bit swap, beam=modelPtr[STATIC_AKUBEAM 0x3e + (modelID-0x39)*2], THREAD_FLAG_DISABLE_COLLISION(0x1000), HIDE_MODEL both, rot{0x40,0,0} scale 0x1000. **Ghidra `1 < kartState-4` = project `kartState != 4 && != 5` (unsigned). ✓**

- **VehPickupItem_MissileGetTargetDriver @0x80064f94** (folds MissileLoadPlayerView/MissileLoadAiView/MissileCandidateVisible/GetDriverPushBuffer) — nearest on-screen non-team driver. Player path: SetRot/TransMatrix(pushBuffer[driverID].matrix_ViewProj [Ghidra DB "tileView"]). AI path: **ConvertRotToMatrix (NOT RotMatrix — prior NOTE(claude) fix @line 178), t=posCurr>>8, MATH_HitboxMatrix inverse is a dead store (plate-confirmed)**. Candidate gate: !=NULL, !=shooter, kartState!=MASK_GRABBED, (!BATTLE_MODE 0x20 || teamID differ), invisibleTimer==0, GTE rtps front(flag&0x40000==0) + viewport rect margins (x∈[0x1f,w-0x1e), y∈[0x15,h-0x14)); min squared XZ dist (posCurr diff>>8). Project's MTC2/MFC2 == Ghidra gte_ldv0/stsxy/stflg. ✓
- **VehPickupItem_PotionThrow @0x800652c8** — throw-velocity by flags: &4 fwd 0x78, &2 back -0x78, &1 spread (RNG_Random(&g_mainRNG)&0x1f)-0x10, none→return 0. vel.xz=matrix.m[0][2]/m[2][2]*v>>0xc, vel.y=0x30, crateInst=NULL, extraFlags|=2. **Ghidra folds fwd case to `*0xf>>9` == project `*0x78>>12` EXACTLY (0x78=8*0xf, >>12 after *8 = >>9). ✓** MixRNG_Scramble()==RNG_Random(&g_mainRNG).

- **VehPickupItem_ShootNow @0x8006540c** (~0x22d8 bytes, switch(weaponID)). Decompiled + full ASM disasm. All cases traced:

  - **case 2 (Bomb/Missile)**: numMissiles<12 cap; target=MissileGetTargetDriver, else non-battle rank fallback (`drivers[driverRank+7]` = `driversInRaceOrder[driverRank-1]`, array-overrun-into-adjacent-field artifact) or battle nearest; spawn DYNAMIC_ROCKET(0x29, id 2/11=ITEM_MISSILE/ALT) or DYNAMIC_BOMB(0x3b, id 1/10), MEDIUM 0x200, sz 0x58; copy matrix; RotAxisAngle(AxisAngle1, rotCurr.y); bomb dir swap (dir.x=rot.y, dir.y=rot.x, dir.z=rot.z), VOICE_BOMB 10; missile victim->thTrackingMe, VOICE_MISSILE 11. **Velocity: project hoists `vel=m*3>>7`+`flags|1` out of branches; verified identical outcome for all 4 (bomb/missile × <10/>=10) cases.** Bomb back-throw negate `-((vel>>1)*3/5)` = ASM `-((s16 v<<0x10>>0x11)*3/5)`. ✓
  - **case 3 (TNT/Nitro)**: STATIC_CRATE_TNT(0x27)/PU_EXPLOSIVE_CRATE(6), MINE, RB_GenericMine_ThTick, sz 0x2c; RunMineCOLL ground-settle (probe ±400/64, quadFlagsWanted=GROUND, TEST_INSTANCES [|HIGH_LOD if<3]); crate-hit union: Ghidra `data.leaf.ptrQuadBlockArray->blockID==7/8` = project `data.hitbox.instDef->modelID==PU_FRUIT_CRATE/PU_RANDOM_CRATE` (union-misguess artifact, project correct); mineHitModel |0x8000; instTntSend set (gated, case-3 only). ✓
  - **case 4 (Beaker)**: STATIC_BEAKER_GREEN(0x47)/RED(0x46), extraFlags 0/1; BTN_UP→flags|4; PotionThrow; if not thrown → shared RunMineCOLL WITHOUT |0x8000, follower init, **does NOT set instTntSend** (Ghidra confirms — validates prior NOTE(claude) mineSetsInstTntSend gate @line 655). ✓ Note: project's ClearMineMotion/driverTarget=0 add harmless dead-stores retail omits (overwritten/unused before read).
  - **★ case 6 (Shield) — BUG (Fix 146)**: instColor birth. **ASM 0x80065b94 loads `a2=weaponInst->thread (0x6c(s2))`, unmodified through INSTANCE_Birth3D @0x80065bd0** → retail parents instColor to the shield thread (like instHighlight below it). Project passed `0` (no owning thread), orphaning instColor. Fixed: `0`→`weaponTh` w/ NOTE(claude). Build exit 0.
  - **case 7 (Mask)**: MaskUseWeapon(driver, 1). ✓
  - **case 8 (Clock)**: numTimesClockWeaponUsed++(0x558), OtherFX 0x44, per-driver clockFlash=4(0x367) + HurtDriver→clockReceive 0x1e00/0x2d00, self clockSend 0x1e. **ASM writes clockFlash BEFORE null-check (PS1 no-memprotect scribble); project's null-check-first reorder is identical for populated slots + native-safe — not a bug.** ✓
  - **case 9 (Warpball)**: model 0x36, TRACKING, sz 0x58; RB_Warpball_* path/target; SeekDriver(checkpoint.currentIndex@0x39a); `otIndexOffset=250` = ASM `sb -6` (same 0xfa byte). ✓

  - **case 0xd (Super Engine)**: superEngineTimer@0x38 = 0x1e00/0x2d00. ✓

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — Vehicle/VehPhysForce.c batch 1 (ConvertSpeedToVec/OnApplyForces/CollideDrivers/CounterSteer, 4 of 7) — Match (no bugs)
- **VehPhysForce_ConvertSpeedToVec @0x8005e104** — scalar speed+heading → velocity via data_trigApprox. vel.y=speed*sin(axisRotationY)>>12; horizMag=speed*cos(axisRotationY)>>12; vel.x=horizMag*sin(axisRotationX)>>12; vel.z=horizMag*cos(axisRotationX)>>12. Ghidra inlines the trig quadrant logic (project's MATH_Sin/MATH_Cos). **Retail's ConvertSpeedToVec IS the (driver, Vec3*) out-param version = project's ConvertSpeedToVecOut; project's 1-arg ConvertSpeedToVec is an added convenience wrapper (→velocity). Not a bug.** ✓
- **VehPhysForce_OnApplyForces @0x8005ea60** — speed clamp FP8(100)=0x6400; originToCenter=matrixFacingDir*{0,25,0} (gte color mtx, ldVXY0 0x190000=pack(0,25)/lcv0=mvmva(1,2,0,3,0)); ConvertSpeedToVec; mud-sink floor (underDriver TERRAIN_MUD 0xe, posCurr.y>-0x1000 → velY=max(velY, -0x1000-posCurr.y)); OnGravity; normalVecUP/AxisAngle1={0,FP1 0x1000,0}, collisionFlags/currBlockTouching=0; velocity+=accel(x,z,y). ✓
- **VehPhysForce_CollideDrivers @0x8005ebac** — velocity-=accel; KILL_PLANE(0x4000)→collisionFlags|=MASK_GRAB_REQUEST(1); SUPER_TURBO_PAD(2)→VehFire(+0x78,0x800), TURBO_PAD(1)→(CHEAT_TURBOPAD? +0x78,0x800 : +0x3c0,0x100); WATER_BSP(0x8000)→vertSplit=0+SPLIT_LINE, else ~SPLIT_LINE; !THREAD_FLAG_DISABLE_COLLISION(0x1000)→PROC_CollidePointWithBucket(sibling + threadBuckets[ROBOT 1]), dist<radiusSum²→VehPhysCrash_AnyTwoCars; SURFACE_PUSHBACK(2)→wall dot<0 → velocity+=diff<<6 (floorDiffY=(quadBlockHeight>>8-spsHitPos.y)+4). **Wall-pushback block was decomp-#if 0'd, reconstructed from binary — present & correct.** ✓
- **VehPhysForce_CounterSteer @0x8005fb4c** — accel=0; guard: |speedApprox|>FP8(3) 0x300, kartState!=KS_CRASHING(1), !ACTION_WARP(0x4000), !wallRubTimer, ACTION_TOUCH_GROUND(1), counterSteerRatio!=0; angle=clamp(turnAngleCurr-turnAnglePrev, ±(u8)angleMaxCounterSteer); strength=(counterSteerRatio*-8000)>>8; accel=rotate(matrixMovingDir, strength*sin(angle)>>12, 0, 0) via gte_rtv0=mvmva(1,0,0,3,0). ✓

### Bug-class re-scan cont'd (2026-07-11) — Vehicle/VehPhysForce.c batch 2 (RotAxisAngle, 5 of 7) — Match (no bugs)
- **VehPhysForce_RotAxisAngle @0x8005f89c** (folds TrigAngleSinCos + CountLeadingSignBits) — builds a rotation MATRIX about axis=normVec by `angle`. Math-dense; traced fully:
  - **Trig quadrant decode**: Ghidra's mislabeled iCos/iSin hold SIN/COS. All 4 (0x400,0x800) combos match project TrigAngleSinCos: (raw_sin,raw_cos)/(-raw_sin,-raw_cos)/(raw_cos,-raw_sin)/(-raw_cos,raw_sin). ✓
  - **Column 1 = axis** (m[*][1] = normVec). ✓
  - **denom==0 degenerate**: dot=sin·nX+cos·nZ; outX sign-flip if normalY<0; outY=-dot>>12; outZ=scaledCosY. ✓
  - **denom!=0**: GTE LZCS/LZCR leading-sign-count == project software CountLeadingSignBits; shift=0x14-lzc normalizes {normalXSq,normalZSq,crossXZ,denom}; divX=(sinRem·nZSq+cosRem·crossXZ)/denom, divZ=(sinRem·crossXZ+cosRem·nXSq)/denom; outX=scaledSinY+divX, outZ=scaledCosY+divZ, outY=-dot>>12. **trap(0x1c00/0x1800) = documented MIPS div-by-zero/overflow guards project omits.** ✓
  - **(short)a+(short)b (Ghidra) == (s16)(a+b) (project)** — mod-2^16-equivalent into s16 field. ✓
  - **Column 0 = normVec × col2** via gte_op12: project CTC2[0,2,4]=axis + MTC2[9,10,11]=col2 = Ghidra gte_ldopv1SV(normVec)/ldopv2SV(&col2)/op12; m[*][0]=MAC1/2/3. ✓

Itemset select: BATTLE→5 (or 4 if enabledWeapons==0x34de), CRYSTAL_CHALLENGE(0x8000000)→6, else switch(numPlyrCurrGame+numBotsNextGame): 2(boss)→7/rank0→0, 3→rank0→0/rank1→2(rng&1→1)/else 3, 4→rank, 5→rank(4→3), 6→rank(0→0,5→3,else (r-1)/2+1), 8→**case-8**. Lap-0: itemSet3&&lap0→2 (battle/crystal never==3, placement inside-else vs after-join is cosmetically equivalent). RNG=(Scramble()>>3)%200 → charPtr[itemSet][(rng*numWeapons[itemSet])/0xc8] (Race1/2/3/4=20/52/20/19, BattleDefault/Boss=20; Ghidra per-case tables g_abRNGItemSet*). Crystal: SKULL_ROCK/RAMPAGE_RUINS→turbo(0) else bomb(1). Boss post: ADVENTURE_BOSS(0x80000000 sign bit)→bossFails(g_abAdvProgress[bossID+0x47]) <3→item∈[7,10)→0xb, <4→[7,9)→0xb, <5&&clock(8)→0xb, DRAGON_MINES&&0xb→2; spring((ITEM_BEAKER|ITEM_BOMB)=4|1=5)→turbo(0); warpball(9)→WARPBALL_HELD(0x1000) gate else 0xb; 0xb&&numPlyr>2&&!battle→numPlayersWith3Missiles<2?++:→2; item∈{0xa,0xb}→numHeldItems=3. ✓

Project `if (driverRank==1) Race2 else (driverRank+(u32)driverRank>>31)>>1` matches EXACTLY. Ranks: {0}→0,{1,2,3}→1,{4,5}→2,{6,7}→3. (The old pre-fix code halved first then tested==1, wrongly giving 2nd place Race1.) ✓
